title: Scale to targets (>=300 orgs / >=1,500 grants / >=150 study records across >=4 sources)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). The shipped milestone scales the map to its coverage targets across >=4 approved sources, preserving 100% provenance and original currency. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Scale the dataset to >=300 organizations, >=1,500 grants, and >=150 study records across >=4 approved sources, with 100% provenance and original currency retained.
acceptanceCriteria: Scale targets met: >=300 organizations, >=1,500 grants, >=150 study records across >=4 approved sources.
100% provenance + retrievedAt maintained; 100% original currency retained (FX-normalized values carry rate/source/date).
Only open/aggregate/org-/award-level data; no patient/controlled-access data (license + domain reviewers verify).
output: data/ scaled dataset meeting the coverage targets, committed via PR.
